campaigns.name: AI Clarity Sprint
campaigns.objective: Generate qualified inbound and outbound pipeline in 90 days
campaigns.targetAudience: Mid-market operations and revenue leaders adopting AI workflows
campaigns.positioning: A practical partner that helps teams operationalize AI without chaos
keyMessages: Turn AI interest into repeatable workflows
Adopt AI with clear process and measurable outcomes
Get stakeholder confidence with visible execution wins
contentThemes: Workflow clarity as a competitive advantage
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture
Phase 3: Conversion — demo requests and SQL handoff
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture

infrastructure.funnelStrategy: Use educational top-funnel content to capture demand, then move high-intent prospects into an audit-led conversion path.
conversionPaths: Primary path: AI workflow audit request for teams with immediate execution pressure
Secondary path: educational nurture for teams still aligning internally on AI adoption
infrastructure.nurtureApproach: Reinforce operational clarity, measurable workflow wins, and low-chaos implementation steps between first touch and sales handoff.

scoringSignals: Requested an audit or strategy consultation
Repeated engagement with AI operations content
Firmographic fit with mid-market service or ops-heavy teams
leadQualification.qualificationThreshold: Escalate to sales when intent plus operational urgency suggest active evaluation.
leadQualification.routingGuidance: Send high-intent leads to revenue for direct follow-up and keep education-stage prospects in nurture.

salesHandoff.process: Provide campaign context, recent engagement, and the stated AI workflow problem before discovery.
